design_philosophy: Neo-Material / Modern Enterprise. A blend of Material Design's spatial logic with neo-minimalist raw aesthetics. It uses exposed bento grids, tactile but crisp elevations (not blurry dropshadows), and an authoritative, 'old money tech' color palette suitable for an elite IIM Kozhikode cohort.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, hero sections, and bento card headers.

body.usage: Standard readable text for case studies, discussions, and directory profiles.

mono.usage: Use for timestamps, tags, analytics numbers, and admin metadata.

accent.usage: Used sparingly for notifications, live indicators, or critical tags (nod to IIM colors).

grid.bento_spans: col-span-1, md:col-span-2, lg:col-span-3 depending on widget importance.

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

surfaces_and_effects.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-200 (Used for sticky headers and the floating AI chatbot).
surfaces_and_effects.neo_material: Crisp 1px borders combined with very subtle, tight shadows (shadow-sm). No massive, diffuse blurs.
surfaces_and_effects.hover_states: Buttons use transform -translate-y-[1px] with increased shadow. Interactive cards get a slightly darker border on hover (border-slate-300).

motion_and_interaction.lists: Staggered fade-in for cohort directory and discussion feeds.

components.navigation: Sticky top navigation. Glassmorphism effect. Must contain Logo, Nav Links (Dashboard, Directory, Case Studies, Projects), and User Avatar/Google Sign-out.
components.chatbot: Floating bottom-right FAB. On click, expands into a glassmorphic chat window. Uses Gemini 3 Flash. Must be clearly identifiable as an AI assistant.
components.directory_cards: Use 'cards' style. Include Avatar, Name, LinkedIn icon, Current Role, and a brief 'Aspirations' tag.
components.admin_dashboard: Bento grid layout. Top row: Analytics summary (Active users, Chatbot queries). Bottom rows: File upload management and case study tables.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select, and Textarea. Inputs should have bg-slate-50, border-slate-200, and focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-800.

media.description: Architectural building with geometric, modern design. Use for auth screen or landing page header.
Business people in a meeting. Use as a header banner for the 'Cohort Discussions' or 'Projects' tab.

accessibility.contrast: All text must pass WCAG AA. Use text-slate-900 on white backgrounds.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have visible focus rings (focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-slate-800).
accessibility.testing: Add data-testid to all buttons, links, and forms (e.g., data-testid='google-signin-btn', data-testid='chatbot-fab').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Neo-Material aesthetic: crisp borders, subtle shadows, and a clean slate/white palette.
Do not use generic blue defaults. Use the exact Slate/Indigo and Accent colors provided.
Ensure the layout is responsive, defaulting to grid-cols-1 on mobile and utilizing the bento grid spanning on desktop.
Implement the AI chatbot as a persistent floating element across member pages.
For the admin analytics, use Shadcn charts or simple metric cards with the 'mono' font for numbers.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for all major headings. If it's unavailable, fallback to a strong geometric sans like Satoshi or Inter with tight tracking.
